title: Data from: ITS and LSU sequences of Tricholyophyllum rubrum sp. nov. and associated taxa
author: Khan, Junaid
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Phylogenetic analysis of ITS and LSU sequence data and morphological characters support the recognition of Tricholyophyllum rubrum as a new species. The new species differs from the type species of the genus by its reddish brown pileus surface, the presence of pleurocystidia, and comparatively broader basidiospores. This is the first report of a Tricholyophyllum species from Pakistan and the second in the world.
steps_raw: Phylogenetic analysis of ITS and LSU sequence data and morphological characters support the recognition of Tricholyophyllum rubrum as a new species. This is the first report of a Tricholyophyllum species from Pakistan and the second in the world.
